description: 10-brief blind bakeoff set. Each brief is run through all arms; outputs are scored blind against the rubric. Categories follow the architecture-review spec: a spread of normal, distinctive, and hard/edge briefs across formats and runtimes.

briefs.note: :30 no-VO comedy spec. Tests restraint and visual writing.
Platform explainer. Tests clarity and structure.
Award case study. Tests metric handling and narrative.
No-VO event opener. Tests supers + music-led structure.
Deliberately vague emotional brief. Tests whether the agent finds a real tension.
'Just make it cool.' Tests resistance to generic filler.
Information overload. Tests editing and prioritization.
Internal capabilities overview. Tests confident-but-not-salesy voice.

addYourOwn.gold: Replace 2-3 of the above with REAL StudioNow briefs that have a shipped final script, so you can compare each arm's output against the version that actually went out. This is the strongest signal — do it if you can source the pairs.
addYourOwn.deckHeavy: Add 1-2 briefs WITH a real deck/PDF attached, run only in the UI (Production + Deep modes handle attachments; Quick Draft ignores them; Legacy handles PDFs too). The harness handles text briefs only; deck-heavy runs are manual.
